reviews.review_description: First off, the moderation is insanely cruel and does not let you go do things without them kicking you. The mods brag about being in the discord and having staff when we can’t get it due to the expired discord link. Go through the mod list and get rid of the bad people to make this game a lot better. Second, the bugs are cruel with me glitching under the ground every 3 seconds after getting jump scared. Fix this please, and finally 3rd there are like never any updates, update the game and add more stuff around the map, hell even a new area would help.
